Perform an ifft and ifftshift on a matrix with each column replaced by its shifted ifft.

Source: R/utils.R
ift_shift_mat.Rd

Perform an ifft and ifftshift on a matrix with each column replaced by its shifted ifft.

Usage

ift_shift_mat(mat_in)

Arguments

mat_in

matrix input.

Value

output matrix.
